summary: Completed comprehensive testing of phone number search and SMS sending fixes. All 6 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Phone Numbers page shows Live/Not on Twilio badges correctly, Inbox from-number dropdown only shows Twilio-purchased numbers, and message status indicators (undelivered) display properly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phone number search and SMS fixes verified. Twilio integration is working end-to-end. SMS delivery shows 'undelivered' status due to A2P 10DLC not being registered (carrier spam filter) - this is expected and NOT a code bug.

phone_number_search_api.GET /api/phone-numbers/available?area_co: PASS - Returns 0 numbers (no toll-free fallback), correct behavior
PASS - Returns 20 local numbers with SMS:True capability
PASS - Returns 0 numbers with note 'No numbers available for area code 999'

sms_sending_api.POST /api/contacts/{id}/send-sms (mock n: PASS - Blocked with error 'Number +17198113942 is not a live Twilio number'

phone_numbers_owned_api.GET /api/phone-numbers/owned: PASS - Returns 7 numbers with correct twilio_purchased field

phone_numbers_page_ui.live_badge: PASS - Green 'Live' badge with checkmark shown for Twilio-purchased numbers
phone_numbers_page_ui.not_on_twilio_badge: PASS - Red 'Not on Twilio' badge shown for mock numbers

inbox_from_number_dropdown.mock_numbers_excluded: PASS - Mock numbers NOT shown in dropdown

inbox_message_status.undelivered_status: PASS - Messages show 'Undelivered' with amber text and explanation 'carrier may have blocked this message'
inbox_message_status.message_bubble_color: PASS - Undelivered messages have red/orange background

mocked_apis.note: All Twilio endpoints are live - no mocking

api_verification.GET /api/phone-numbers/available?area_co: 200 OK - Returns empty array (no toll-free fallback)
200 OK - Returns empty array with note
api_verification.POST /api/contacts/{id}/send-sms (mock): 400 Bad Request - 'not a live Twilio number'
api_verification.GET /api/phone-numbers/owned: 200 OK - Returns numbers with twilio_purchased field

notes.sms_delivery: SMS messages show 'undelivered' status due to carrier spam filters (A2P 10DLC registration required). This is expected behavior and NOT a code bug. The Twilio API call succeeds (status=queued, SID returned), but final delivery fails at carrier level.
notes.area_code_search: 718 area code returns 0 numbers because Twilio has no available local numbers for that area code. The fix correctly prevents falling back to toll-free numbers when a specific area code is requested.
